license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4nxqvfn
title: CRISPResso analysis
author: Hanqin Li

steps_raw.instruction: In linux, use the following command: CRISPResso --fastq_r1 R1_reads.fastq.gz –fastq_r2 R2_reads.fastq.gz --amplicon_seq amplicon_seqeunce_here -g sgRNA_sequence_here
Use CRISPRessoBatch command if having many samples
For more details, https://github.com/pinellolab/CRISPResso2 CRISPResso2 provides accurate and rapid genome editing sequence analysis.. Nature biotechnology.
